name: DSACS – Staff Nurse, Lab Technician and More – 31 Posts
qualification: Any Bachelors Degree, Any Graduate, Any Masters Degree, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, BMLT, Diploma, DMLT, M.Phil/Ph.D

basic_details.job_title: DSACS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 31 Staff Nurse, Lab Technician and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Delhi State AIDS Control Society (DSACS) Recruitment 2026 for 31 posts of Staff Nurse, Lab Technician and More Posts. Candidates with Bachelor's Degree, Master/Post Graduate Diploma, DMLT, BMLT Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 22-04-2026, and closes on 23-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through DSACS official website dsacs.delhi.gov.in.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the DSACS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
